title: Activity in Email & Activities
excerpt: You can translate “Activity” into your available language, such as Call Summary, Meeting (e.g. in Polish). Additionally, to be able to change the order on the “Activities” list, just like the order of statuses on all boa…

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml: You can translate “Activity” into your available language, such as Call Summary, Meeting (e.g. in Polish). Additionally, to be able to change the order on the “Activities” list, just like the order of statuses on all boards. So that you can arrange them in your order.
